summary: Comprehensive testing of POS restaurant system completed. Backend APIs fully functional (22/22 tests passed). Core POS functionality working perfectly including authentication, product management, cart operations, and order processing. Minor admin navigation routing issue identified but core features operational.

integration_issues.issue: Admin gets redirected instead of accessing products and reports pages directly via URL navigation

passed_tests: Frontend user login and POS access
Frontend admin login and dashboard access
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin routing issue where direct navigation to /products and /reports pages redirects admin away instead of displaying the pages. Categories page works correctly, so check routing configuration for products and reports routes.
